title: Lupus-class missile frigate

The '''''Lupus''-class missile frigate''', also known as the '''Trade Federation Missile Frigate''', was a light [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] prior to and during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] and by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Navy]] early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Missile/Legends|Missile]] [[Frigate/Legends|Frigate]] was a long, curve-hulled vessel with two pincer-like protrusions at the bow. It was armed with [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers, and could launch between two and four [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] at a time. These missiles left orange-red trails and caused a large blast radius on impact. It was also armed with six anti-starfighter cannons, had a [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield generator]], and was [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]-capable.<ref name="SW:SF" />

==History==
The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] engaged several Missile Frigates in combat during his assaults against Trade Federation forces in the [[Karthakk system]]. These ships also participated in the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockade]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="SW:SF" />

They were in use during the [[Occupation of Karthakk]]. A blockade of Missile Frigates ambushed the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] [[Aken (Acclamator-class)|''Aken'']] during its [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|approach]] to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] prior to the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. With the aid of [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], the ''Aken'' broke through the defensive line and reached the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface.<ref name="SW:JSF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trade Federation Missile Frigates first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']].

*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] {{1st}}
